violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store boxes of potatoes off floor in walk in cooler. Close pizza crust boxes/bags in walk in freezer.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Pork loins being thawed on counter in restaurant side kitchen.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Potato salad container dated 10/20/25 in restaurant side 2 door upright cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in both kitchens. Carpeting in storage room next to c-store kitchen matted and filthy.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
